underlying_goal: Diagnose why their Automatic Ripping Machine stopped working and set up monitoring for when the fix (new MakeMKV beta key) becomes available
friction_detail: Claude initially theorized settings.conf was empty as the root cause before the user redirected to the actual issue of the key expiring at UTC midnight.
brief_summary: User needed to diagnose why MakeMKV stopped working (beta key expired at UTC midnight) and set up monitoring for the new key; Claude diagnosed the issue and helped plan a changedetection.io watch.
